name: RegisterPatient
purpose: Validate required fields, create patient record, generate unique patient_id
behavior: Check that name, dob, contact, insurance are present in patient_data; generate a unique patient_id; store patient record in patients database; return success with patient_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with name, dob, contact, insurance

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (patient_id), message

global_vars.description: Write new patient record to patients database

data_operations.description: Insert new patient record with generated patient_id

constraints.description: patient_data must contain name, dob, contact, insurance fields

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient record is created in patients database with unique patient_id

name: BookAppointment
purpose: Check patient exists, check doctor availability, create appointment record, send confirmation
behavior: Verify patient_id exists in patients database; check that appointment_time is not in the past; check doctor availability for that time; create appointment record in appointments database; return success with appointment_id

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id), message

guarantees: appointment is not in the past

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id, doctor_id, appointment_time

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (appointment_id), message

global_vars.description: Read patient record to verify existence
Read existing appointments for availability check and write new appointment record

data_operations.description: Verify patient_id exists in patients database
Check doctor availability by reading existing appointments

constraints.description: appointment_time must not be in the past
Doctor must be available at the requested time

acceptance_criteria.description: Appointment record is created in appointments database with unique appointment_id
Patient existence is verified before booking

name: RetrieveMedicalRecords
purpose: Retrieve all medical records for a patient, sorted by date descending
behavior: Query records database for all records matching patient_id; sort by timestamp descending; return list of records

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

postconditions: records are returned sorted by date descending

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (list of records), message

global_vars.description: Read medical records for the given patient_id

data_operations.description: Query records database for patient_id and sort by timestamp descending

constraints.description: patient_id must exist in patients database

acceptance_criteria.description: All medical records for the patient are returned sorted by date descending

name: UpdatePatientProfile
purpose: Update patient profile fields, validate insurance change against external system
behavior: Update patient_data fields in patients database; if insurance field is changed, validate against external system before saving; return success with updated data

semantic_inputs.name: patient_data
semantic_inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

semantic_outputs.name: patient_result
semantic_outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

postconditions: patient profile is updated in database

inputs.name: patient_data
inputs.description: Patient payload with patient_id and fields to update

outputs.name: patient_result
outputs.description: Result dict with success, data (updated fields), message

global_vars.description: Read current patient record and write updated fields

data_operations.description: Read current patient record to compare fields
Write updated patient fields to database

constraints.description: Insurance change must be validated against external system before saving

acceptance_criteria.description: Patient profile is updated in patients database with validated insurance change
